欢迎交友！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8SUwWY29gv8vtSqAYQqYU0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3daef132cfcd4312af0527e09f1d7b99~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881349&x-signature=wp9nUYm7M3NsJ9Rz4I%2FqBK36LkE%3D","user_id":"22404209326255","user_name":"木槿莨息"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"22404209326255","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1737908770,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7434003871338351640","book_info":{"abstract":"【短剧已上线】
【扮猪吃虎小作精&偏执霸总；高冷女经纪人&痞帅男顶流】
【穿书+搞笑轻松+扮猪吃虎+打脸+甜宠+双洁】
苏玉和江宜穿书了。
闺蜜成了妯娌。
哥哥是偏执霸总，弟弟是娱乐圈顶流。
好消息：两人嫁入豪门，吃喝不愁。
坏消息：两人都是炮灰，不久就要下线！
——
傅家规定，周日的饭要儿媳妇来做。
苏玉不想动手，小作精属性大爆发：“老公~菜上有虫子，我害怕……”
傅晏辰在一声声“老公”中迷失自我，亲自下厨。
苏玉：怎么样，厉害不？
江宜：死丫头，演爽了吧？
—— 
江宜穿书前是娱乐圈女顶流，一朝穿书，竟成了经纪人。
机缘巧合下，江宜再次登上舞台，成了萧寒的搭档。
萧寒按照动作将人拽入怀里。
一支优秀的舞，眼神间的传递也是关键。
江宜看着他，狐狸眸带了丝挑逗的意味。
一向在舞蹈方面展现出高水准的萧寒。
因为江宜一个眼神，整个人乱了拍……
——
后来，江宜在娱乐圈发光发热，再度成为顶流。
苏玉重操旧业，成为江宜唯一的摄影师。
——
再后来，两兄弟正在书房闲谈。
秘书慌里慌张的跑了进来：“傅总，不好了，夫人她要上恋综！”
萧寒看热闹不嫌事大：“大哥，你要被绿了啊？”
秘书转头看向他：“二少爷，二夫人也去了！”
萧寒笑容凝固在脸上：“你说什么？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7b2e7c34fd957607f7f9248724798f94","author":"犀小牛","author_id":"","book_id":"7434003871338351640","book_name":"和闺蜜穿书豪门，死丫头演爽了吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8e0d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4780人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":748,"name":"豪门总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=748&name=豪门总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":521,"name":"作精","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=521&name=作精&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7434004020710097432","read_count":"4780","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1001863"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"497","tags":"豪门总裁,现代言情,总裁,扮猪吃虎,甜宠,作精","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/eb2fceafb8d5ccab4a7321174b7d30c2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779503745&x-signature=W3U6JucidUcXg8o11pYeURdoVac%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3472693278547689","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"151"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324103545D98E4491C298EC81D44A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":34,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15063,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":28458},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1737877905,"author_reply_time":1737878215,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7535008618376446745","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]一开始看到四百多章的完结文还在想，这么多，会不会看到一半就不想看了，但是，事实证明作者大大写的真的很好，一章没跳地看完了。好久没有看到这么好看的书了，必须写一个长长的书评[爱心]
苏玉和傅晏辰，萧寒和江宜，顾陵游和林书珩，秦歌和宁迟，每一对都好好嗑，每一对的故事都很甜，没有什么特别让人怄气的情节，反倒是一直都有趣有糖。小玉玉真的好可爱，哈哈哈，霸总他真的超爱，枯木逢春超甜的。寒江cp绝对yyds，娱乐圈顶级夫妇👫🏻。还有我们顾林cp真的是超治愈，好温暖。明艳姐姐和弟弟也超好玩，不看番外还真是没想到是个白切黑的弟弟[笑哭]。我们青梅竹马也是超甜[飞吻]段嘉言和冉冉那种青春羞涩感，啊啊啊真的好好嗑啊[舔屏]还有段弈被阿摇治愈也是很好的结局
看到结尾还有番外，心里真的感觉好治愈，四大cp都是很美好的爱情
最后：作者大大你真的超棒，这本书真的超好看[爱心][爱心][爱心]","text_exts":[{"e":218,"s":215,"text":"娱乐圈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A8%B1%E4%B9%90%E5%9C%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774319745EC81D44A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227535008618376446745%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227434003871338351640%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A8%B1%E4%B9%90%E5%9C%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":287,"s":283,"text":"青梅竹马","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%9D%92%E6%A2%85%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774319745EC81D44A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227535008618376446745%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227434003871338351640%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%9D%92%E6%A2%85%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754386450,"group_id":"7434003871338351640","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"错过了秋枫冬雪，会迎来春天的樱花。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyD2Uj/EQrncvf7ZpbKcTAXb1hYHcBV9Twx8dlS90pTn","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/87240a4f736148e2ab87cab6d1a516c1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881961&x-signature=cPunYmXvgmYTmH3rPaa%2FpIjT4Yw%3D","user_id":"3694829919284843","user_name":"黎安安啊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3694829919284843","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":fa
